issues.detail: tainted=12288 has bit 13 set. An unsigned module bypassed verification. Re-sign DKMS modules and reboot.
Secure Boot is meant to imply lockdown=integrity, but /sys/kernel/security/lockdown reports [none]. The chain is not enforcing module signature checks.
There is a MokNew entry waiting. Reboot and complete enrollment in MokManager (blue screen, press a key, choose Enroll MOK).
